Values.value: Is the connection enabled (1) or not (0)

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: The current number of messages in the client side queue for this connection

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: The maximum number of messages in the client side queue for this connection
